name: finance managers in accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For finance managers in accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual tracking causes cash flow gaps. We automate procurement spend data aggregation instead of manual tracking and reporting using spreadsheets.
target_audience: finance managers in accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month
problem_solved: Inability to efficiently track budget variances leads to cash flow gaps.

locked_fields.primary_user: finance managers in accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month
locked_fields.primary_problem: Inability to efficiently track budget variances leads to cash flow gaps.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For finance managers in accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual tracking causes cash flow gaps. We automate procurement spend data aggregation instead of manual tracking and reporting using spreadsheets.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking and reporting using spreadsheets

one_liner: For finance managers in accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual tracking causes cash flow gaps. We automate procurement spend data aggregation instead of manual tracking and reporting using spreadsheets.
